# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading ContosoUniversity from .NET Framework 4.8 to .NET 10 (net10.0). The project is migrated in-place from ASP.NET MVC 5 to ASP.NET Core MVC using an All-at-Once strategy. SDK-style conversion is performed first, then the full framework migration.

**Progress**: 0/3 tasks complete <progress value="0" max="100"></progress> 0%

## Tasks

- 🔄 01-sdk-style: Convert ContosoUniversity to SDK-style project format ([Content](tasks/01-sdk-style/task.md))
- 🔲 02-upgrade: Upgrade ContosoUniversity to net10.0 and migrate to ASP.NET Core MVC
- 🔲 03-validation: Final validation and cleanup
